    static Map<String, ExpenseTrackerModel>
    DataVizUtils.computeCategorySummary(ExpenseTrackerModel model, int timeWindowOrdinal)
    Computes a category summary where the model's transactions are partitioned by category (represented as a map from each category to its own ExpenseTrackerModel with only the transactions with that category).
